prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划: 2021–2025年最低位次约3645→3891→4216→4484→5080，连续5年持续后移，累计后移约1435名；2025年基准约5080名，近2年累计后移约596名，后移速度有所加快；2021–2025年计划数分别为71、69、64、67、75人，呈波动上升趋势；2026年计划71人，较2025年缩招4人（-5.3%），对竞争略有缓解作用。
prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 985、211、双一流；软科主榜2026年约第16名，近年稳定在前20，属于顶尖综合性大学；2026年声誉评价为"明显负面"，涉及多起教师学术不端和师德失范事件（51件事件中46件负面），可能影响部分考生报考意愿；抖音热度排名第35（较热），关注度中等；2022–2023年曾出现投档线异常信号，对报考心理有滞后影响；口腔医学A+、中国语言文学A+、护理学A+、临床医学A、数学A等19个A-及以上学科，学科实力极为雄厚，对高分考生有较强吸引力。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 计算机类、电子信息/通信、电气工程、口腔医学、临床医学等专业持续高热推荐，与川大优势学科高度匹配；天津市2026年考生总数约82000人，较2025年增长约14%，竞争显著加剧；四川大学位于成都，非本省高校；天津考生对京、津、沪高校偏好较强，对西南地区高校存在一定地域距离感，可能影响报考热度。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合历年位次持续后移趋势、2026年计划小幅缩招（缓解竞争）、考生总数大幅增长（加剧竞争）、声誉负面舆情（抑制报考）以及学校顶尖层次和优势学科的吸引力（支撑位次），在2025年基准5080名基础上，预计2026年最低位次约5000名，区间4500–5500名。

major_tier_recommendation.tier_1:
一档（最难进）
- 口腔医学（5+3一体化）
- 口腔医学（五年制）
- 临床医学（五年制）
- 计算机类（含双学士学位）。
major_tier_recommendation.tier_2:
二档（中等难度）
- 电子信息类
- 电气类
- 工科试验班（智能制造）
- 化学类
- 工科试验班（先进化工与高端装备类）。
major_tier_recommendation.tier_3:
三档（相对好进）
- 法学
- 人文科学试验班（中文与新闻传播）
- 外国语言文学类（含双学士学位）
- 哲学
- 中国古典学（拔尖计划）
- 国际政治。
major_tier_recommendation.overall_advice: 位次在预测区间4500–5500名内，建议以二档专业为主力、一档专业冲刺、三档专业保底。位次优于区间下限（4500名以内）可重点冲刺口腔医学、临床医学等王牌专业；位次在区间中段（约5000名）建议以计算机类、电子信息类、电气类等热门工科为主；位次接近区间上限（5500名左右）建议优先考虑三档专业并确保录取。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum ranking approximately shifted from 3645 → 3891 → 4216 → 4484 → 5080, continuously moving backward for 5 consecutive years, with a cumulative backward shift of about 1435 places; the 2025 baseline is about 5080, with a cumulative backward shift of about 596 places in the last 2 years, and the backward speed has accelerated; from 2021 to 2025, the enrollment numbers were 71, 69, 64, 67, 75 respectively, showing a fluctuating upward trend; the 2026 enrollment plan is 71, a reduction of 4 students (-5.3%) compared to 2025, which slightly alleviates competition.

学校层次与声誉.title: School Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: 985, 211, Double First-Class; ranked about 16th in the 2026 Soft Science Main Ranking, stable in the top 20 in recent years, belonging to a top comprehensive university; the 2026 reputation evaluation is "significantly negative", involving multiple incidents of teacher academic misconduct and ethical violations (46 negative out of 51 incidents), which may affect some candidates' willingness to apply; Douyin popularity ranking is 35th (relatively hot), with moderate attention; from 2022 to 2023, there were abnormal signals in the admission score line, which have a lagging impact on application psychology; Oral Medicine A+, Chinese Language and Literature A+, Nursing A+, Clinical Medicine A, Mathematics A, and 19 other A- and above disciplines, with extremely strong disciplinary strength, strongly attracting high-scoring candidates.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Majors such as Computer Science, Electronic Information/Communication, Electrical Engineering, Oral Medicine, Clinical Medicine, etc., continue to be highly recommended, highly matching Sichuan University's advantageous disciplines; the total number of candidates in Tianjin in 2026 is about 82,000, an increase of about 14% compared to 2025, significantly intensifying competition; Sichuan University is located in Chengdu, not a local university in this province; Tianjin candidates have a strong preference for universities in Beijing, Tianjin, and Shanghai, and have a certain geographical distance from universities in the southwest region, which may affect application enthusiasm.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the continuous backward trend of historical rankings, the slight reduction in the 2026 enrollment plan (alleviating competition), the significant increase in the total number of candidates (intensifying competition), negative reputation public opinion (suppressing applications), and the attraction of the school's top level and advantageous disciplines (supporting rankings), based on the 2025 baseline of 5080, the minimum ranking for 2026 is expected to be about 5000, with a range of 4500–5500.

major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_1:
Tier 1 (Most Difficult to Enter)
- Oral Medicine (5+3 Integrated Program)
- Oral Medicine (Five-Year Program)
- Clinical Medicine (Five-Year Program)
- Computer Science (Including Dual Bachelor's Degree).
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_2:
Tier 2 (Moderate Difficulty)
- Electronic Information
- Electrical Engineering
- Engineering Experimental Class (Intelligent Manufacturing)
- Chemistry
- Engineering Experimental Class (Advanced Chemical Engineering and High-End Equipment).
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_3:
Tier 3 (Relatively Easy to Enter)
- Law
- Humanities Experimental Class (Chinese and Journalism Communication)
- Foreign Languages and Literature (Including Dual Bachelor's Degree)
- Philosophy
- Chinese Classical Studies (Top Talent Program)
- International Politics.
major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: For rankings within the predicted range of 4500–5500, it is recommended to focus on Tier 2 majors as the main force, sprint for Tier 1 majors, and use Tier 3 majors as safety options. Candidates with rankings better than the lower limit of the range (within 4500) can focus on sprinting for flagship majors such as Oral Medicine and Clinical Medicine; candidates with rankings in the middle of the range (about 5000) are advised to focus on popular engineering majors such as Computer Science, Electronic Information, and Electrical Engineering; candidates with rankings close to the upper limit of the range (around 5500) are advised to prioritize Tier 3 majors and ensure admission.
